name: Stromboli
recipeIngredient: 2 loaves (1 lb each) frozen bread dough, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the dough rise in a warm place until doubled.
2. Punch down the dough.
3. Roll the loaves together into one 15x12 inches rectangle.
4. Layer 4 oz of ham and pepperoni on half of the dough (lengthwise).
5. Sprinkle with 4 oz chopped onion and diced green pepper.
6. Top with 1/4 cup pizza sauce.
7. Layer 4 oz sliced mozzarella, bologna, salami, and Swiss cheese over the sauce.
8. Sprinkle with 1 tsp dried basil, oregano, garlic powder, and pepper.
9. Spread another 1/4 cup pizza sauce on top.
10. Fold the plain half of the dough over the filling and seal edges well.
11. Place on an ungreased baking pan measuring 15x10x1 inches.
12. Bake at 375°F for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
13. Brush with melted butter before serving.
14. Serve the remaining pizza sauce alongside the sliced stromboli.
